programme.desc: The wait is over, and Jey finally delivers for Nacha. Celia sends a group to work at the aquarium. Xavier's celebration continues, and the girls sneak out of the club, leading to a fight between Mane and Jawy.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy and Mane's tension continues. Xavi decides to invite Pepe to stay at the house. The Shores start to doubt Fernanda. Karime seeks out the notary to validate her virginity, and Mane and Fernanda end up in a heated confrontation.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Fernanda get into a physical fight. The conclave decides to give Fernanda an exam to prevent her expulsion. A soccer match between the Shores and the Big Hippos will determine the future of the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The exam concludes, and Fernanda stays in the house. Chile overhears the rejected girls’ plan and exposes them. A dance instructor puts Mane and Karime in their place. A brawl erupts at a restaurant.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After confronting Mane, Dania makes an important decision. The Shores attend a band class where the "Verga Muerta" corrido is officially born. Jawy talks to Fernanda, and Mane is determined to leave Dania alone in the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier and Pepe face off once again. A group of witches arrives at the house, and not everyone is pleased with their predictions. During the girls' night, Dania apologizes to Mane, and her reaction leaves several people speechless.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo regresa con ganas de venganza y la intensión de revelar verdades a la prensa que hundirían a Gustavo, pero Aurora tiene un plan para volver a ser congelada. Blanca le pide a Martín que se haga un examen de ADN para ver si son hermanos.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo se despide de Aurora en medio del teatro que ella creó. Martín también ve a Aurora y queda muy impresionado, pero su juego tiene consecuencias graves para su salud y una decisión médica puede cambiarlo todo. Inés vuelve a engañar a Blanca.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora se deja seducir por los deseos de Martín. Blanca los sorprende, siente celos y trata muy mal a Aurora. Esta comienza a cansarse de sus propias mentiras y quiere que su padre la descongele. Gustavo recibe una inesperada declaración de amor.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Las llamadas clandestinas de Gustavo a Natalia despiertan los celos de Lorenzo, que se lo reclama a puño limpio. El director está muy enfermo y consulta a Aurora sobre la criogenización.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Cocó se arrepiente y le dice toda la verdad a Leonardo. Humberto le dice a Pedro que debe despedir a Basilio, pero él no está de acuerdo. Paloma se pone celosa al ver a Leonardo con Renata. Pedro e Ignacio se enfrentan por Fernanda.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma le dice a Leonardo que le debe una disculpa, se besan. Basilio impide que Pedro los vea, le dice que debe reconquistar a Fernanda. Humberto ordena despedir a Basilio, pero Pedro no está de acuerdo. Santiago despierta.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda le pide a Pedro que firme unos documentos y él lo hace sin siquiera leerlos. Ignacio le pide disculpas a Pedro. Inés tiene miedo por el regreso del Chamoy. Ivonne le dice a Basilio que tiene novio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le pregunta a Fernanda qué documentos firmó y ella responde que el acuerdo con los españoles. Se los entrega a Ignacio. Leonardo desconfía del Chamoy. Basilio está despechado porque Ivonne e Ignacio son pareja.

programme.title: Madre Luna

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua arrive in a village in East Gorteau but find no trace of the inhabitants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: A pair of Chimera Ants appears and hunts Gon under the cover of night, overwhelming him with their attacks. Feeling that things are at a standstill, he gathers up his Nen and prepares to throw a punch.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Shoot are lying in wait for Cheetu. But just as Cheetu is about to approach them, he suddenly changes direction and disappears. Meanwhile, Killua and Gon sense that someone is following them again.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The assassin Ikalgo, an octopus-type Chimera Ant, attacks Killua with his Nen Abilities. Killua captures him and tells Ikalgo that he'll let him live if he divulges his ally's abilities.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon tries to bond with a Chimera Ant called Meleoron, even though it's risky for a Nen user to reveal his abilities.

programme.desc: Knov infiltrates the palace. His goal is to place the exits for his ability, the Fourth Dimensional Mansion.

programme.desc: Gon and Killua have gained new allies and prepare to charge into battle.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his ex-wife Gayle reconnect at their twenty-year high school reunion with unforeseen results. Eddie discovers an abandoned baby under his tower with a note imploring him to take care of it for 24 hours.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: When building work at an abandoned cottage unearths hidden remains, Jane uncovers family secrets.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark still hasn't gathered the courage to dump Sophie.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Both Mark and Jeremy have trouble with Alan Johnson.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: To get some time away from his future bride Sophie, Mark joins a gym.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy is thrilled when one of his musical heroes, The Orgazoid, employs him as a general handyman.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Fran tries to cleanse her lifestyle by taking up yoga and going on a radical diet, while Bernard and Manny receive some books on Freud and their lives descend into his famous theories.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: The noise from the construction next door drives Bernard, Manny and Fran up the wall. Fran suggests a holiday.

programme.title: Plebs: The Baby
programme.desc: Grumio finds an abandoned baby at the bins, who he decides to parent, despite Marcus wanting her out of the house.

programme.title: Plebs: The Patron
programme.desc: Marcus is unwilling to pay for the medicine that Grumio needs, as he uses his slave's sickness to get closer to Cynthia.

programme.title: Mr. Bean: Merry Christmas Mr. Bean
programme.desc: It is Christmas time and an excited Mr. Bean creates his usual havoc across the festive season. He brings new meaning to “dressing” the TURKEY, whilst his girlfriend, Irma, looks forward to a very special Christmas present……

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean treats himself to a weekend in a HOTEL. Unfortunately, he feels his room lacks certain essential amenities. In his own ingenious way, he solves that problem only to be faced with another when he locks himself out of his room.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister joins a battle-hardened convict army, trained to go on suicide missions.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Kryten, who has been reprogrammed, starts his own pay TV station for the prisoners.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Douglas finds that marriage agrees with him...for all of two weeks. He soon finds himself in court defending himself.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: An incident involving spilt coffee, a homeless person and Roy and Jen being filmed on a camera phone goes viral on the internet. Once identified their reputations and that of Reynholm Industries are at risk and everything they do only makes it worse.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Contestants in "The All-England Summarize Proust Competition" are judged in swimsuit and evening-gown categories; an irate customer confronts his travel agent. Also: an expedition to Mount Everest, made by an international group of hairstylists.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Surgical tools applied to a mildly anesthetized patient include a power drill and a mallet; a TV program features a lecture on gastropods, highlighted by the visit of a whelk.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A climbing expedition negotiates a hazardous London road; an attempt is made to determine whether an urban dwelling is a house or a lifeboat. Also: a mouse's quest for cheese, which leads to the production of a Western called "Rogue Cheddar."

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Mr Pither; Clodagh Rogers; Trotsky; Smolensk; Bingo-crazed Chinese (British Ambassador); 'Jack in a Box'.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies and Alex Horne set anarchic tasks for comedians. They learn how to not break an egg and paint with the internet.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies and Alex Horne test the skills of their troupe of comedians - Can Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe fill an eggcup with tears, remember an ozzie rules football team or play Taskmaster squash?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Film & Theater Styles, Secret, Let's Make a Date, Duets, Hats, Picture, Party Quirks, Moving People.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: New neighbors cause problems for Louisa, Martin and the local people. Residents also begin to discover something unusual about PC Penhale.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilson, the hypochondriac owner of the Wilson hotel, forces her attentions on a very indifferent Martin, which makes Louisa jealous.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Pauline's gambling addiction finally comes to a head after an explosive confrontation in the surgery.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When his mother has to go to hospital, Peter Cronk needs a place to stay. The doctor isn't too keen, but Louise is busy with her candidature for headmistress.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Al discovers that Bert is not his natural father; Martin diagnoses food poisoning for a rural family with a mysterious unseen mother.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: An old man, inexplicably emanating a horrible stench, consults Doctor Ellingham. Meanwhile, the local radio host, Caroline, seems to have a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin examines Helen Pratt, but she collapses and dies. Her husband, Phil, is angry with the doctor and blames him for his wife's death.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin is puzzled when his cold and difficult parents come to stay with him, though he hasn't seen them in seven years.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Mark Mylow plans to spend his stag night sleeping rough in the woods with Al Large, but gets bitten by an adder.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: A Salvation Army member arrives in Portwenn trying to trace a missing woman; Danny asks reluctant girlfriend Louisa to move in with him and Mark Mylow's medical check has a shocking result.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Aunt Joan is forced to receive treatment from Martin after nearly running someone over. The Doc is approached by Alison Lane, who worries about her daughter Delph's behavior.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Bert Large abandons his plumbing business in favor of running a restaurant. Following the restaurant's opening, several cases of food poisoning occur, with Louisa being one of the people affected.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A sangre fría
programme.desc: Cuando un teniente de la policía de Nueva York, recientemente retirado y bien considerado, es acusado de disparar a un grupo de posibles asaltantes en el metro y posteriormente desaparece, Frank debe enfrentar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El camino al infierno
programme.desc: Danny debe determinar quién asesinó a un hombre cuando varias mujeres que trabajaron para él se atribuyen el mérito.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Erin se siente abrumada por la culpa después de que un hombre al que liberó es acusado de matar a un policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whitney and Mariel's feud escalates, while Samantha surprises a couple on behalf of her foundation.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Whitney and Mariel reconcile their friendship, Mariel finds a wedding venue, Samantha worries about her reproductive health, and Amber pushes forward with her racing career.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: The ladies head to Daytona for one of the most dangerous races of the season, and Amber struggles to land a sponsor.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Hostilities are renewed when Whitney and Mariel snub Ashley's invite to Kurt's birthday party, and Samantha helps Amber prepare for her big race at Hickory Motor Speedway.

programme.title: Racing Wives
programme.desc: Kyle helps Amber improve her lap time on the track, signaling to Samantha that she's ready for the big leagues, and Whitney tries to apologize for missing Kurt's birthday.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Rachyl puts her dreams of becoming a lawyer on hold to support her husband, Kerry, in chasing after his goal of being a country musician in Nashville.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 06/01/2017. Tennis great Billie Jean King’s win over Bobby Riggs was a milestone in the push for gender equity, sparking music that included messages of female empowerment.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 06/08/2017. See the course of the Cold War through the lens of Berlin, as well as the music that helped sow the seeds of change.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/22/2015. Bill Weir travels to India to study conservation efforts to save the majestic Bengal tiger and visits an architectural marvel: the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/05/2015. As rising sea levels threaten to destroy this historic jewel, Bill Weir travels to Venice where he investigates the sinking city.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/12/2015. The Wonder List visits the Alps to climb the incredible peaks, but the glaciers are receding, and lives are at stake if the melt continues.

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 03/07/2021. When Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation, was his motive about moral integrity or military necessity for a struggling Union Army?

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 03/14/2021. As the Civil War ended, Lincoln delivered the most iconic speech and piece of legislation of his career, but at great cost to his marriage and family.

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 03/21/2021. After Lincoln's assassination, his wife and the country unraveled. The US was rife with racial conflict, and his death set the stage for Civil Rights struggles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Special Operations Unit coordinates a city-wide “buy bust” sting designed to apprehend street level drug dealers. Officers join units in pursuit of a stolen SUV. An officer arrests two brothers for public intoxication.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicycle chase leads to a bizarre reunion between an officer and suspect, police respond to a domestic dispute, and officers respond to a suspicious vehicle in a local park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover a young man strangled to death by hanging ...whose body looks like that of a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encuentran en un bar y una de ellas es asesinada. Cuando una segunda pareja es asesinada de forma similar, el equipo sospecha que una pareja de asesinos en serie anda suelta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a fire hydrant washes away all the evidence at a crime scene, the CSIs must recreate a very bizarre double murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder at a roller derby match, the only thing shorter than the girls' skirts are their tempers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami is ablaze with crime and chaos when Memmo Fiero, Horatio Caine's wife's killer, returns to take control of the city.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team try to figure out which of the nerds took revenge when a high school bully is stoned to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a woman narrowly escapes death at the hands of a serial killer, Horatio will do anything to track down the psychopath.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover an exclusive hunting club where the prey is human, the most dangerous game of all.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a delivery truck driver and a housewife on his route are murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team try to find their connection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An escaped prisoner takes Natalia hostage and tells her a shocking secret about his crimes. Horatio Caine and the rest of CSI the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine has decided to protect a mixed martial arts fighter from his dangerous brother who recently escaped from prison.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a co-ed dead in a hot tub, they investigate a case marked by jealousy, psychosis and college roommates.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine chases down a mysterious murder suspect, he discovers that the man's entire life is an elaborate charade.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie, and Carstairs have escaped back to the 1917 war zone, but General Smythe is waiting for them and opens fire on them with a machine gun.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the War Chief who belongs to the same race of people as the Doctor and offers an alliance. In the 1917 zone fighters prepare to attack Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The war games are over and the Doctor is put on trial by the Time Lords for breaking the laws of time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the newly regenerated Doctor to Earth to begin his exile. Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart leads a UNIT investigation into a mysterious meteorite shower.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: A recovered Doctor escapes the hospital and joins UNIT in their investigation. Meanwhile, Channing directs one of his Auton servants to recover a meteorite.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: Sam Seeley has found one of the meteorites but the Autons want it back and are closing in. General Scobie visits Auto Plastics, playing into the hands of Channing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The invasion begins as Auton shop dummies come to life and attack the public. The Doctor and UNIT infiltrate Auto Plastics where the Doctor faces the Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: UNIT is at a project run by Professor Stahlman who intends to penetrate Earth’s crust. But the drilling has already released something deadly from beneath the Earth’s surface.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: Transported to a parallel world, the Doctor discovers that England is under military rule and the drilling project is at a more advanced stage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: In the parallel world, the drilling project is about to penetrate the Earth’s crust. The Doctor, arrested as a spy, is unable to convince his captors of the danger that faces them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: In the parallel world, Earth’s crust has been penetrated, releasing terrible forces from within the Earth. The Doctor must escape back to his world to prevent the same catastrophe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: As the Earth in the parallel world faces destruction, the Doctor is desperate to return to his world to warn them of the danger. But time is running out.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The Doctor has escaped the doomed, parallel Earth and has returned to his own world where he attempts to put a halt to the drilling project.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons
programme.desc: The Master paves the way for an invasion by the insidious Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons
programme.desc: The only clue to the Master's plans is a single plastic daffodil.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons
programme.desc: The Master is broadcasting an activation signal to open a channel for the Nestenes.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo arrive at Stangmoor Prison for a demonstration of the Keller Machine, a device capable of extracting negative emotions from criminal minds.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: A prison riot puts Jo in danger while the Doctor assists the Brigadier. Meanwhile, at the World Peace Conference, the Chinese delegate's aid prepares to kill the American delegate.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: Newly recovered, the Doctor escapes from his cell with Jo. The Master plans to use the Keller Machine to recruit the rioting inmates at Stangmoor Prison and attack the World Peace Conference.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The mind parasite within the Keller Machine becomes too powerful for the Master to control. It learns how to move on its own and goes on the hunt for new minds.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil

programme.desc: El equipo tiene 48 horas para investigar un antiguo campamento de presos.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From Circuit of the Americas in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Lunges, lockups and intra-team tussles; Featuring the best moments from the 2024 season opener in Bahrain.

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Getting ready for the thrill of the Saudi Arabian Grand Prix; Max Verstappen continues his title defence, but keeps an eye on the rookie Oliver Bearman, who's looking to score points in his F1 debut.

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Check out the best moments of the 2024 Japanese Grand Prix - a race featuring a dramatic start, memorable overtakes and much more!

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: The Formula One grid competes in the first Chinese Grand Prix since 2019. Lewis Hamilton is a six-time winner of this race, including four of the last six runnings. Max Verstappen returned to the winner's circle in Japan, but has yet to win in China.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: Qualifying of round 5 of the 2024 Formula One World Championship, the China Grand Prix at Shanghai International Circuit in Shanghai, China.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From April 21, 2024.

programme.title: Post-Race Show
programme.desc: Interviews, reaction and expert analysis from the race.

programme.title: Jolyon Palmer's Analysis
programme.desc: F1 TV's Jolyon Palmer dissects all angles, telemetry and archive footage as he examines the key incidents from Shanghai.

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Featuring the key moments from a race in Miami, filled with drama and so much more.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Join us to hear from F1 Academy Managing Director, Susie Wolff, on all things F1 Academy and find out what the drivers have been up to pre-season, plus highlights from Qualifying and both Races.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Come and join us for a day in Miami with F1 Academy drivers, Courtney Crone and Nerea Marti, and hear from Doriane Pin after her dominating weekend at the first round of the 2024 season in Saudi.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: There's plenty of action on and off-track as we go behind the scenes with series leader, Abbi Pulling and celebrate International Women in Engineering day with Ruth Buscombe. Watch highlights from qualifying and both races as the action heats up!

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: The sand dunes of Circuit Zandvoort host round 4 of F1 Academy, as we see who is going to challenge series leader, Abbi Pulling, at the mid-point of the 2024 season.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: We learn more about driver support and talent pathways with F1 Academy's Katie Baldwin, and take a trip out with Tina Hausmann and Lola Lovinfosse for a birds-eye view of the track.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Formula 1 is a sport like no other and the Formula 1 Channel is the ultimate destination to catch up on all the action from F1, F2, F3 and F1 Academy races throughout the season, including analysis, replays and documentaries.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will be riding on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. Male contestant is placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair off into the water. Couple will be placed together in a Plexiglas box with separated. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb up 4 stories on a hook and ladder with 70 pounds of gear. Contestant must lay in a pit for 2 minutes while scorpions are dropped on them. Contestants will be put on a platform suspended from a crane 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Team of two contestants will be in a four-walled roof-less office- type room that is filled with desks, chairs, filing cabinets, etc. Contestants will be bound in straight jackets and will have amount of time to escape.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will be put in a clear plex-glass tube that will be lifted up and placed just above the water. Snakes and lizards will be dumped in the box. Contestant will be standing on a plexi-glass incline pirtched on top of a roof in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will exit a helicopter and release a flag. They will be standing on platforms suspended in the air. Contestant must chew through the cow intestine. Contestants will ride a mini motorcycle across a beam that is suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Joe Rogan, in a crowd of fans, counts down the top 15 stunts from all the shows up till this point.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire. One contestant will be placed in a Plexiglas box filled with bugs.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After the murder of a wealthy Chicago man, Atwater and the team dig in to uncover the truth, suspecting there is more to the story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight and the team delve into a cold case in search of clues to solve a shocking new crime; with its focus on buried memories, the case sparks concern for Burgess and Ruzek about Makayla's mental healing.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: As the team closes in on drug kingpin Javier Escano, Voight is forced to lie to his undercover informant Anna to keep her on track; their deteriorating trust threatens an increasingly tenuous operation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After an explosion rocks the case, the team scrambles to finally take down Escano as everyone nears their breaking point.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Still reeling from the death of informant Anna, Voight faces a new threat as he tries to keep the neighborhood clean; new wrinkles develop in the Upton, Halstead and Voight dynamic; the team gets a new chief.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When a convicted murderer hijacks a prison van, the team scrambles to find him and the abducted prison guard before it's too late; Burgess questions Ruzek's motives in a case, creating tension between the two.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team investigates a string of brutal pharmacy robberies, and Halstead connects with one of the victims about their Army careers; Upton suspects there is more to the story and confides in Voight.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A shocking murder pulls rookie officer Dante Torres into his own neighborhood; as Voight and Atwater help him navigate the case and manage tricky personal dynamics with wary neighbors, Torres realizes his life may be forever changed.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Upton's dogged pursuit of a missing teenage girl leads the team into a dark web of human trafficking; chief O'Neal becomes involved with the unit's investigation when it becomes evident his son, Sean, has a connection to the missing girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Atwater's reactions during a tense arrest are called into question; the team must dig in to uncover key evidence that could aid in the ongoing investigation and clear Atwater's name.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When actionable evidence finally surfaces against Sean O'Neal, Upton and the team work relentlessly to build a case in secret; they discover Sean is more elusive and dangerous than anticipated.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: To distract Intelligence from the investigation into his son, Chief O'Neal forces the team to handle a "dead fish" case; when that dead fish turns into a complicated heater case, Burgess is thrown back into difficult memories from her past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King,which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.
