programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Bruce Frederick Joseph Springsteen, more fondly known as "The Boss" by his millions of fans, is widely regarded as one of the most influential songwriters of the 20th century and one of the greatest artists of all time. This is his remarkable story.

programme.title: Classic Albums: The Doors' The Doors
programme.desc: The making of The Doors' 1967 debut album and includes information about the early history of the band, how each song developed and interviews with the band's surviving members.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins
programme.desc: The den of the deadly Tarantulas gang, this island is the most dangerous place on Earth… and Lupin's right in the middle of it! A dark mystery haunts his past, and the key to it is on the island.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/30/19 - The Yankees use a nine-run 7th inning to rally past the Red Sox and sweep their two-game set in London.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/09/20 - The Cardinals made postseason history in 2019 with a 10-run 1st inning against the Braves. The historic frame was a Major League record for runs in the 1st inning of a playoff game. St. Louis would win the game, 13-1, clinching a spot in NLCS.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game
programme.desc: Host Michelle Beadle explores the original Yankee Stadium (1923-2008), including many changes that occurred during the 1974-75 renovation.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: Yankees infielder Aaron Boone creates one of the most memorable moments in the rivalry between the Yankees and Red Sox in the 2003 ALCS.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: The 1992 Pirates were one out away from advancing to the World Series when Braves catcher Francisco Cabrera stepped to the plate with the bases loaded and two outs in the ninth.

programme.title: Fenway Park 100 Years
programme.desc: Fenway Park first opened on April 20, 1912 and since then has been known for its unique features and historic moments. Current and former Red Sox players share their experiences playing in one of baseball's greatest ballparks.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Mookie Betts returned to the leadoff spot for the Dodgers and proceeded to hit three home runs against the Padres. In doing so, Betts tied Sammy Sosa and Johnny Mize as the only players in MLB history with six career three-homer games.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Fernando Tatis Jr. hit a laser of a three-run homer in the 7th inning, then followed that up with a grand slam on a 3-0 pitch in the 8th. The slam was the first of the young phenom's career and caused a bit of controversy in the process.

programme.title: MST3K: Fugitive Alien
programme.desc: Movie constructed from two episodes of a Japanese television show. An alien marauder becomes a fugitive from his planet Valnar's Star, then joins the Earth spaceship Bacchus 3 to fight against his former masters.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera
programme.desc: A giant mutated turtle wakes from eons of slumber and attacks Japan in Gamera: The Giant Monster (1965). The Bots create their own beauty salon and are treated to a visit from Gamera himself.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Barugon
programme.desc: The Mads send the crew another Gamera movie. This time, a group of travelers scour the jungle in search of a giant opal. What they find is actually the egg of a lizard-dog creature called Barugon.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Gaos
programme.desc: Gamera is back and this time he is up against Gaos, a bat-monster with the ability to shoot laser beams. Joel and the Bots make an arts and crafts project.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Guiron
programme.desc: It's Gamera Movie #4, including the Gamera Theme Song and a reenactment of an old favorite magic trick.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: MST3K: Hercules
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a casual day on the SOL and endure another incoherent Hercules movie (Hercules (1958)).

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Abraham decide confesar a sus compañeros el romance entre Arantxa y Fernando. El grupo se divide para pasar la tarde en el gimnasio y en la peluquería. Luego en la casa, Arantxa vive un momento muy intenso

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa después de la disco Arantxa se enfrenta intensamente a Elettra mientras Abraham se enfada mucho con Mane porque cree que esta se ríe de su amiga española

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: Bob Trow picks up the Bob Dog costume from Mister Rogers. Handyman Negri provides both royal birds with a three-cornered hat. Quickly finding a hat to fit Bob Dog, however, proves to be a bit more difficult.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the Colonial Williamsburg Millinery Shop, Mister Rogers wears 18th century clothing. Mayor Maggie informs King Friday that those in Westwood are planning to take off their three-cornered hats.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Chuck Aber demonstrates a small backhoe. Lady Aberlin has a fan, a flashlight and a measuring tape for the owls to use when they go into the tunnel. Mr. McFeely shares a video about how people make tortilla chips.

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto and his squad manage to catch up to Idate, only to find him hurt and unconscious with Aoi nearby.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Despite interference from Aoi, Idate continues his run. Idate still trusts no one, and it’s revealed that during the Chunin Exams, Idate’s older brother was the proctor who posed the tenth question.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Boss Jirocho waits, confident that Idate will win. But Aoi, the ninja sent by the Wagarashi clan, stands in the way.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shikamaru is promoted to chunin, and he and his squadmates celebrate at a BBQ restaurant. In the hospital, Lee decides to undergo a dangerous surgery to repair his body so that he can remain a ninja.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto and Sasuke release their ultimate weapons against each other, and just in time, Kakashi arrives to stop the fight.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Sound Ninja Four, Kidomaru, Sakon, Jirobo and Tayuya, suddenly appear before Sasuke. Sakura is concerned about the Curse Mark placed on Sasuke by Orochimaru…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sakura’s pleas fall on deaf ears, and Sasuke leaves Hidden Leaf Village. When Tsunade learns of this, she summons Shikamaru to lead his first mission as a chunin.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Sound Ninja Four race toward Orochimaru’s lair with Sasuke in hand. They’re discovered and challenged by the jonin Genma and Raido…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto and the others are trapped in Jirobo’s Earth Dome Prison. They try to pound their way out, but the walls regenerate each time.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: After they are freed from the Earth Dome Prison, Shikamaru and the others take off after the remaining Sound while Choji stays behind.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: After Choji takes the yellow pill it looks as if he may win the battle, until Jirobo transforms into Second State, giving him immense power.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Assuming that the Leaf squad could never get past Jirobo, the remaining Sound ninja don’t bother to lay traps along the way.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Neji takes on Kidomaru while the others continue their pursuit of Sasuke and the remaining Sound ninja.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kidomaru changes tactics and creates a bow and arrow to attack Neji’s blind spot.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto, Shikamaru, Kiba and Akamaru are in hot pursuit of Sasuke and the Sound ninja. Naruto and Kiba are upset that they have been unable to catch up and decide to try a surprise attack at night.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Akamaru sets explosives in the trees to trap Sakon. But an incensed Sakon turns the tables, and the explosives end up sending Kiba, Akamaru and Sakon off a cliff.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shikamaru is determined to stop Tayuya, but she uses her Summoning Jutsu to call forth three giants. Meanwhile, on the plains, the battle between Kimimaro and Naruto is about to begin.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Ukon, who is able to infiltrate the bodies of others, enters Kiba’s body and tries to merge with his cells.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: An injured Kiba and Akamaru barely escape from Sakon and Ukon. Naruto is locked in battle with Kimimaro…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shikamaru succeeds in trapping Tayuya with his Shadow Possession Jutsu. But Tayuya moves to her Second State and fights back with enormous strength.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: With Rock Lee there to take on Kimimaro, Naruto is free to chase after Sasuke, who has awakened.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Shikamaru, Kiba and Lee are at the limits of their strength when Gaara, Temari and Kankuro appear to assist their Leaf allies.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kimimaro realizes that close combat is impossible against Gaara’s wall of sand, so he moves further away for a long-distance attack.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kimimaro succeeds in shattering Gaara’s protective sand shield and attacks Gaara. Naruto finally catches up to Sasuke…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: With the Curse Mark covering half his body, Sasuke is no longer the Sasuke of old. Naruto charges at this new Sasuke who has turned his back on his closest comrades.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Scott tells his fiancé, Kellie, that he's calling off the wedding. Later Angel is a drag queen who has 2 lovers and neither knows he's cheating. Finally Renee will tell her boyfriend, Billy, that she's been cheating with his best friend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Holiday food fights, proposals, poetry and North Pole dancers, this episode has it all.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: In this special episode, a group of select viewers will duke it out with some of Jerry’s outrageously memorable guests!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nichelle’s here to stop her cousin Talibah from marrying Tyisha. Nick tells Chelsea that he was born a woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The truth comes out on today's Jerry Springer Show! Michelle tells her lover David that she's really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex-girlfriend back from her new lover Tom.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dra confesses to his girlfriend Chance that he had a one-night stand with his best friend's girlfriend. Jennifer admits to cheating on her fiancé with his best friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie has been cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tonya wants to tell her man that she's pregnant and cheating with her transsexual roommate, Gina! Mike has been sleeping with his fiancé’s cousin for a year! Then, Jimmy has a pregnant fiancé AND girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shannon's sister, Margie, has been cheating with Shannon's fiance! Next Robert is about to learn that his new wife has been having a secret affair. Later Damon and Shanna just had a baby, but he's worried because Shanna is here to tell him a secret.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Je’nier has a wild secret to share with Preston. Then, it’s Nikki and Nikky going after one man! Will Nikki or Nikky win Kevin’s heart? Does Kevin deserve either’s love?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carlton is here to reveal to his girlfriend that he’s leading a gay double life. Plus Tom Bergeron from TV’s ‘Dancing with The Stars’ will play celebrity judge in a dance-off. Then, Crystal reveals her infidelity to her husband Bobby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeremiah says that his 14-year-old female client's mom agreed to the tattoo, but girlfriend Nikki can't shake off her 13-year-old sister's accusations against him. Then will Brandon's wife take him back after he attacked her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo piensa cumplir lo que le prometió a Mairita pero su mamá lo descubre. Maribella quiere que Luis Mario se acueste con ella. Pero el no lo acepta.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Yolanda le confirma a Octavia y a Marfil la boda de Maximiliano con Marcela. Silvia le dice a Diana que Max jamás será feliz al lado de Marcela. El Comisario visita a Maximiliano para hablar del crimen de Fiona.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Silvia intenta levantarle el ánimo a Diana y le sugiere que se vayan de vacaciones. Yolanda le pide a Octavia que cancele su matrimonio con Ignacio. Larry cuestiona a Sharon respecto a su complicidad con Kike contra Fedora.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano va al hospital y se encuentra a Diana. Lala le pide a Rodrigo que recapacite y luche por seguir junto a Fedora. Marfil se disculpa con Pedro y le cuenta sus problemas.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana cede ante la solicitud de Esteban, quien con sus mentiras logra convencerla e ir juntos al compromiso de Margot y Willy. Margot intenta comprar a Jaime, pero no acepta su oferta, ya que es leal a Willy.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le dice a Luis Mario que Maribella si puede ver y que lo está engañando. Luis Mario no le cree. Imanol vuelve a pedirle disculpas a Adriana. Ella las acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario contesta el teléfono pero nadie habla. Sonia le cuelga el teléfono a Fidelia y le pregunta con quien estaba hablando. Rodrigo lleva a Karina a su casa y queda en recogerla al día siguiente.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A trio of unsuspecting mermaids find themselves in hot water after releasing a bad guy from his barrel of a prison. Over at the royal palace, Luffy gets up close and personal with the Mermaid Princess!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's lightning reflexes spare the Mermaid Princess from a grisly death, Neptune's army attempts to apprehend the Straw Hats, and Captain Vander Decken forges a sinister undersea alliance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their backs against the wall, the Straw Hats are forced to take King Neptune and his men hostage. On the other side of the palace, Luffy and the Mermaid Princess make plans to visit the Sea Forrest!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy accidentally "kidnaps" the Mermaid Princess, an old friend issues a grave warning to Chopper and Sanji, and the New Fish-Man Pirates prepare for a raid on Ryugu Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Captain Vander Decken and Hordy Jones manage to successfully breach the defenses of Ryugu Palace. Meanwhile, Jimbei waits patiently for Luffy to arrive at the Sea Forest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin ventures into the forest in search of ancient secrets, Zoro takes to the water for a slicing, dicing showdown with Hordy Jones, and Luffy is branded a royal kidnapper by an angry mob of fish folk!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Chopper, and Sanji are taken prisoner by a fish mob just as Vander Decken launches an attack the princess! Elsewhere, Zoro continues his battle with Hordy, and Nami hitches a ride on a mermaid to escape the crumbling palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Neptune fight bravely, but they're no match for Hordy and his pill-popping minions. Back at the ship, Luffy reunites with Jimbei, who reveals something sinister about his past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The New Fish-Man Pirates continue their bloody and violent uprising, and Jimbei begins the story of how he unleashed the monster known as Arlong on the unsuspecting citizens of the East Blue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei continues his story with tales of fish-men taken as slaves, Queen Otohime's fierce devotion to her people, the legend of Fisher Tiger, and the sinister rise of Arlong.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arlong's violent tendencies are condemned by Fisher Tiger, and the arrival of a young human girl teaches the Fish-Man Pirates a lesson in compassion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The great pirate Fisher Tiger keeps his promise to a young slave girl, but the adults in her village are determined to make him pay for his act of honor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Fisher Tiger's tragic death, the once-mighty Sun Pirates are splintered by an ongoing quarrel between Jimbei and Arlong. Meanwhile, Queen Otohime's ceasless quest to help her people begins to take its toll.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Tensions run high when a slave-owning Celestial Dragon washes up on Fish-Man Island. His former captives cry for out for blood, but Queen Otohime sees it as a chance to mend fences between the gilled and non-gilled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After an agonizing absence, Queen Otohime returns to her people with exciting news. Unfortunately, a horrific act of violence derails the queen's mission and changes life on Fish-Man Island forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei reaches the heartbreaking conclusion in the story of Queen Otohime, Nami does something completely unexpected, and Hordy Jones makes a foreboding appearance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy announces his sinister plans for Fish-Man Island. Luffy and Shirahoshi are ready to fight, but Jimbei wants to wage this war on his own!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Jimbei come to blows over how to handle Hordy's uprising. Back at the palace, Brook embarks on an out-of-body experience with hopes of saving his mates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei and Luffy continue their standoff, the New Fish-Man pirates go on a rampage, and Hordy begins to experience startling side effects from his pill-popping habit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's rampant use of the energy steroid makes him bigger, stronger, and scarier than ever before! The Fish-Man princes join the battle, but even they may not be strong enough to stop Hordy's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei and Shirahoshi are captured by the enemy, and Hordy makes a shocking revelation to the population of Fish-Man Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi reveals that she knew the truth about her mother's murder all along, and Luffy makes a bone-crushing entrance when the princess needs him most!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy announces his plan for turning humans into slaves, the people of Fish-Man Island throw their support behind a new champion, and Luffy amazes even his own friends!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang show off how much stronger they've become by issuing a brutal beat down to Hordy and his ferocious Fish-Man Pirates! Can anything stop the Hats?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's men keep attacking, but the Straw Hats have new weapons at their disposal! Franky unleashes the fury of the Black Rhino, and Luffy turns the tables on Hordy with a little help from his Kraken!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky dazzles Usopp and Chopper by transforming into a gigantic fighting robot, Hordy tries to blackmail the Kraken, and Luffy introduces his fist to the Fish-man's face!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy shows off even more new powers as he brutally pummels Hordy, but the main attraction proves to be an ancient and immense pirate ship that's heading straight for Fish-Man Island!

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ashley (EMILIE ULLERUP) is confronted by the sinister John Druitt (CHRISTOPHER HEYERDAHL) who possesses a powerful force and a baffling knowledge of her mother, Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING).

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING), her daughter Ashley (EMILIE ULLERUP), and new to the Sanctuary, Dr. Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) release three women from a mysterious crypt in Scotland, bringing them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: An investigation into a string of bizarre robberies leads Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) to a crime ring of thieves who seem to be able to slip between the cracks of the law...literally.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An ailing Maiya (Montse Viader) must "merge" with her dimensional double, Isabel (Montse Viader), before the Taelons use her to crack the Liberation movement, which has lost its leader, Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen), to the U.S. presidential race.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr. Belman's (Majel Barrett) daughter Joyce (Polly Shannon) becomes part of a tainted Taelon bioengineering experiment, which turns her into a lethal alien hybrid bent on destroying Earth and the Companions.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) attempts to rescue Lili (Lisa Howard) who is being held hostage by an escaped Jaridian (Andrew Jackson) aboard an abandoned Kimeran vessel.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: In the hope of transferring his consciousness into a healthy body, Sparrow (Bruce Clayton), a disabled genius, invents "biosurrogates" with Jaridian programming, only to have one escape on a killing spree.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance team regroups to fight a new Taelon/Human enterprise called Second Chances, which makes old and ailing people young again, but also turns them into fervent Companion supporters by implanting false memories.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When a long lost love returns, Tyr disappears from the ship to protect her from an assassin.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Set in an alternate universe where Dylan died and Gaheris Rhade is trying to reform the Commonwealth.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The group that attacked the Andromeda during the first Commonwealth charter signing returns to wreak more havoc.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Trance runs through a number of different scenarios, trying to find one in which her crewmates don't die.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A "more powerful" Andromeda ship explodes due to likely sabotage, forcing Dylan's crew to save them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Alpha's Kevin is with a 75-tonne crane that's stranded in remote countryside. Lantern's newest op Euan battles through a jam caused by the lorry he has been sent to recover on his first solo call-out.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Vehicles in need of recovery include a Land Rover Discovery dumped in a canal, an artic that has lost traction on a steep gradient, and a truck that's nosedived into a back garden.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Alpha op Kev has been sent to a popular beauty spot to rescue a bin delivery truck that has got stuck. Lantern op Steve is sent to a scaffolding truck that's stuck in a sinkhole and Crouch op Wes has a weighty problem when a truck hits the skids.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a missing woman whose description is remarkably similar to the five murder victims from a serial killer case he worked twelve years ago.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and team search for a teenage boy, Ethan Sawyer, after he disappears from his home. Ethan's parents think that their son is a happy teenager about to take his Scholastic Aptitude Tests.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: An unidentified young Hispanic boy is abducted from a Spanish Harlem street. Jack and the team are completely baffled when no family members come forward to look for the child.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a dedicated and respected firefighter who disappeared after rescuing two fellow firemen from a building engulfed in flames.

programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for a driven neurosurgeon, Dr. Lianna Sardo, who disappeared after a nighttime jog in the city with her ex-husband, Dr. Evan Mayhew.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for Joe Gibson (JERRY O'CONNELL), a public defender who disappeared after a chase and gunfight with unidentified figures.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Renowned motivational speaker Will Sterling is kidnapped at his mansion minutes before his limousine arrives to take him to the airport for an out-of-town seminar.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jesse Prince, a female ex-cop turned bounty hunter, vanishes after being shot at in front of a fugitive's home. Jack and the team look through her past cases for potential suspects.

programme.title: FBI

programme.desc: When the daughter of a wealthy family is kidnapped in an attempt to gain notorious internet fame, Maggie and OA discover the kidnapper's plans go far beyond abduction in order to never be forgotten.

programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: 3000 Miles to Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: The Kill Room

When a student writes the police code for homicide, 187, inside a textbook owned by teacher Trevor Garfield, he feels threatened.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: Jonathan Cross (Chris Klein) is an all-American hotshot, the most popular player in the fastest and most extreme sport of all time: Rollerball.

programme.title: Supernova

programme.title: Mimic

programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: The Blob
programme.desc: THE BLOB has returned in this horrific tale about a vile, malignant life-form that crashes to earth in a cozy, rural American town called Arborville. Untroubled by conscience or intellect, the Blob does only one thing-and does it well. Rated: R

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Freedom Writers
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: Girl, Interrupted
programme.desc: Winona Ryder and Academy Award(r)-winner Angelina Jolie are the certifiable stars of Claymoore Hospital's South Bell ward in this wry adaptation of Susanna Kaysen's best-selling memoir.

programme.title: Leaving Las Vegas
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage garnered a Best Actor Oscar for his hauntingly disturbing portrayal of a suicidal alcoholic who falls for a compassionate Las Vegas prostitute (Elisabeth Shue) in one of the year's most critically acclaimed films.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Winner of 6 Academy Awards, including Best Picture, and based on the hit Broadway musical, Chicago is a dazzling spectacle cheered by audiences and critics alike, where crimes of passion make way for legends to those seeking the spotlight.

programme.title: Bugsy
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: One Night In Miami...
programme.desc: One Night in Miami' is a fictional account of one incredible night where American icons Muhammad Ali, Malcolm X, Sam Cooke, and Jim Brown gathered, discussing their roles in the civil rights movement and cultural upheaval of the 1960s.

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate
programme.desc: The story takes place in modern-day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen-year-old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Air, Water, Earth, Fire. Four nations tied by destiny when Fire launches war against the others. Caught between the war, one Avatar discovers he's able to manipulate all four elements.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When high school senior Tripp discovers a gas-guzzling creature named Creech, the unlikely duo team up for a fun-filled, hilarious and heartfelt adventure in a real-life super-powered Monster Truck to reunite Creech with his family.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of “France,” by way of far- off, far -out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Spaceballs

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Mary showcases her dishes that are perfect for a party. Sometimes cooking for a crowd can be very daunting, but Mary loves sharing her ideas that are fun, different, and don’t take forever to prepare.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Birds and Bees
programme.desc: Inspired by chirping birds and buzzing bees, charming host Jessica McGovern bakes adorable desserts, including sweet and salty Bird's Nest Cookies and an over-the-top Honey Apricot Dessert Tower drizzled in sticky goodness.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Coffee Klatch
programme.desc: In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Kids Bake Sale

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear
programme.desc: Juliet Sear creates some stunning centrepieces for today's Beautiful Baking. There's a fabulous multi-coloured Pinata Cake, a cheesy Risotto Cake, and a stunning Vegetable Tart.

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear
programme.desc: Juliet creates an amazing spread for a Winter Woodland-themed party with the help of DJ buddy Dev Griffin, who learns how to make her Winter Woodland Mushroom Cake.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child whips up Coquilles St. Jacques, the French dish with sea scallops. She shows how to poach scallops in white wine, how to make the accompanying sauce, how to prepare the dish ahead of time and how to gratinee the final dish.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child prepares everybody’s favorite savory French pie -- Quiche Lorraine. She demonstrates the perfect pie dough recipe and makes a pastry shell, and she shows how to make several types of quiches.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child prepares simple and beautiful desserts for every occasion. She demonstrates other uses for pastry shells, makes French custard fillings, strawberry tarts, and apple tarts, and shows how to glaze fruit tarts.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Ease and elegance with chicken breasts and rice. Julia Child shows how to bone chicken breasts, how to poach them in butter, how to make a winey cheese sauce, how to boil rice so it is fluffy and how to fix rice ahead of time.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child demonstrates how to make a vegetable platter with string beans, carrots, mushrooms, and spinach.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child showcases ten-minute wonder dishes, including Veal Scallops. Julia shows you how to cut veal scallops, how to make quick and delicious sauces for sauteed veal or chicken and demonstrates the French method of cooking green beans.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child focuses on tossed salads and French dressings, preparing mixed green salads, mixed vegetable salads, and French dressing. She also demonstrates how to dress and serve salad the French way.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child prepares sauteed chicken livers and hot and cold mousse of chicken livers and illustrates how to prepare chicken livers for sauteeing, how to saute, and how to make a Madeira sauce for chicken livers or other meats.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child demonstrates the most popular way to serve a duck -- roasted and a l'orange. Julia shows how to prepare a duck for roasting, how to prepare an orange sauce, and how to serve and carve a roast duck.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming Tsai and Jodi Adams, chef and owner of Porto in Boston's Back Bay, use unfiltered apple cider in their culinary creations. Jodi prepared a spicy Vadouvan Curried Scallops while Ming created a tender Braised Pork Shoulder.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: James Beard Award-winning chef Karen Akunowicz makes a flavorful Carchiofi alla Guidea--deep fried artichokes--among the best-known dishes of Roman Jewish cuisine. Ming prepares Shrimp and Jerusalem Artichoke Toast with a Watercress Salad.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag, known for her role as a judge on Chopped, Amanda prepares Duck Breast with Pine Nut Relish, followed by Ming who does a Tea-Smoked Duck Breast with Gingered Peaches and Watercress Salad. It's duck two ways!

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Typhoon winds to withstand, a rigid deadline to meet, and a towering goal no skyscraper has ever reached. The Pearl River Tower even generates its own power; it is the holy grail for mechanical engineers.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Building one of the world’s tallest TV towers, the Guangzhou Sightseeing and TV Tower (now called the Canton Tower).

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Stadiums have been regarded as architectural masterpieces, none more so than the Colosseum in Rome.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: From living in caves to grand mansions, shelter has always been high on the list of priorities.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Discovering the transport networks of the past.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Temples, designed to honor the Gods, have been at the heart of cities since earliest times.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: Who are these people that venture into space? Once they were test pilots, then scientists and engineers now teachers, politicians and paying tourists what does it take to earn the astronaut wings?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Emissiaries
programme.desc: NASA and others are developing new innovative propulsion systems, Ion thrusters, solar sails and the science fiction 'Warp drive' is not as far away as once thought.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living with Space
programme.desc: Astronauts and Cosmonauts train and study for years to work and live aboard the International Space Station. With this wealth of experience and insight behind them what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: AMISTAD is about a 1839 mutiny onboard a slave ship that is traveling towards the Northeast Coast of America. Much of the story involves a court-room drama about the slave who led the revolt.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: Written and directed by Academy Award winner Sofia Coppola, Marie Antoinette is an electrifying yet intimate re-telling of the turbulent life of history's favorite villainess. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls (2006)
programme.desc: To Jill Johnson, it was the perfect babysitting job. The parents were away. The fridge was stocked. The children were tucked into bed. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When a devious mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels, aided by their loyal sidekick Bosley (Bill Murray), set out to bring down the bad guys.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The "Angels", three investigative agents (Barrymore, Diaz and Liu) who work for the Charles Townsend Detective Agency, return for another high-octane series of adventures as they investigate the theft of a database of witness protection profiles.

programme.title: Devil in a Blue Dress
programme.desc: Denzel Washington turns up the heat as a L.A. private eye in this steamy mystery from executive producers Jonathan Demme and Edward Saxon and director Carl Franklin. Washington stars as Ezekiel "Easy" Rawlins. Rated: R

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: A father and daughter form an unlikely songwriting duo in the summer before she leaves for college.

programme.title: East Side Sushi
programme.desc: Single mom Juana can slice and dice anything with great speed and precision. After working at a fruit-vending cart for years, she decides to take a job at a local Japanese restaurant. Intrigued by the food, she learns to make a multitude of sushi.

programme.title: C'mon C'mon
programme.desc: Johnny and his young nephew forge a tenuous but transformational relationship when they are unexpectedly thrown together in this delicate and deeply moving story about the connections between adults and children, the past and the future.

programme.title: After Yang
programme.desc: When his daughter's beloved A.I. companion malfunctions, Jake (Colin Farrell) uncovers details of the robot's previously unknown life hidden in the android's interior core, leading Jake to surprising discoveries about himself & his family.

programme.title: Where's Poppa?
programme.desc: Gordon finally meets the perfect girl, but his batty, eccentric mother is intent on ruining his chances. George Segal and Ruth Gordon shine in Carl Reiner's outrageous black comedy that stomps gleefully on the idea of devotion to Mom above all.

programme.title: The End
programme.desc: When Sonny (Burt Reynolds) is diagnosed with a fatal disease, he swallows a bottle of pills to end it all! Instead, he ends up in a loony bin beside the demented Marlon (Dom DeLuise) who is eager to help Sonny succeed...one madcap attempt at a time!

programme.title: Summer Rental
programme.desc: This routine comedy is about a series of misadventures during a family vacation at the beach and stars John Candy (who died of a heart attack while filming in Mexico in 1994) as John Chester and Karen Austin as his long-suffering wife Sandy.

programme.title: The Innkeepers
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees - Claire and Luke - are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels.

programme.title: Life After Beth
programme.desc: Zach is devastated by the unexpected death of his girlfriend, Beth (Aubrey Plaza) until she miraculously comes back to life. However, the newly returned Beth isn’t quite how he remembered and before long, Zach’s whole world takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Carriers
programme.desc: Chris Pine stars in the intense and gripping thriller, Carriers. The terrifying story follows four teens who discover that they are far more dangerous to one another than the deadly global virus they are desperate to outrun.

programme.title: Red State
programme.desc: The abduction of three teenaged boys leads to a guns-blazing standoff between a military task force and a band of fanatical fundamentalists.

programme.title: Faceless After Dark
programme.desc: Following her breakout success as the star of a killer clown horror flick, Bowie now finds herself struggling to capitalize on its success. But when she is held hostage by an unhinged fan posing as that same killer clown, horror becomes her reality.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: Art The Clown sets his sights on three young women, along with anyone else that gets in his way.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: After being resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County where he begins to target a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween.

programme.title: The Lookout
programme.desc: Chris "Slapshot" Pratt, whose once-bright future has been dimmed by a severe head injury, is a night janitor at a bank. Lonely and frustrated, he falls prey to a con man and agrees to help rob the bank where he works.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: Changing Lanes
programme.desc: Late for court, an attorney weaves in and out of traffic. In a different lane, a father whose right to see his children rests on getting to court on time. A minor accident will turn these two strangers into beasts.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: Layer Cake
programme.desc: Planning to retire and begin a new life, Mr. X (Daniel Craig, Lara Croft: Tomb Raider), a successful West End drug dealer, has been asked for one last favor: to negotiate the sale of one million hits of Ecstasy. Rated: R

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: The world's finest wines, sweeping vineyards and fine food couple with a river valley dotted with castles. We sample the best Bordeaux then cruise the lovely Dordogne and Lot rivers with stops at chateaux, ancient watermills, and perched villages.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: The South Island of New Zealand weaves Kiwi culture with scenic splendor. The vast vineyards of Marlborough helped bring this country's wines to the world stage.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We leave Western Europe behind as we venture to the exotic cities of Prague and Budapest. In Prague, we marvel at the startlingly beautiful old town. Bohemian glass dazzles us as we browse the flourishing shops in this former Communist country.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: For a totally different view of Europe, Rudy shows smart travelers how to organize a trip around a theme. Rudy discovers surprising and fresh takes on Europe as he sets out on a music lover's tour.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Paris Side Trips
programme.desc: After roaming Versailles — the palace of palaces — we'll drop in on exquisite Vaux-le-Vicomte and extravagant Fontainebleau, marvel at Chartres Cathedral… and dine like kings.

programme.title: The Netherlands: Beyond Amsterdam
programme.desc: Zipping from Haarlem to Rotterdam, and from Delft to the former Zuiderzee, we'll enjoy fragrant cheese markets, soggy polderland, charming towns, and windmills both new and old.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: The Best of Israel
programme.desc: We'll discover the best of Israel, stopping in passionate, traditional Jerusalem, cosmopolitan Tel Aviv, the fortress of Masada, the Sea of Galilee, and the Yad Vashem memorial.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Germany's Hamburg and the Luther Trail
programme.desc: Hamburg, Germany's mighty port city, has a gleaming skyline and a brisk creative energy. From there, we'll visit the Reformation sights of Erfurt and Wittenberg, and finish in wine-loving Würzburg.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: We enjoy Renaissance art in Florence, the city that propelled Europe out of the Middle Ages. Then we visit two cultural capitals in their own right: Pisa, where we'll marvel at a tipsy tower; and Lucca, where we'll celebrate Puccini.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: In Paris, we'll cruise the Seine River, pay a visit to Napoleon's tomb, and take in the majestic Louvre. Then we'll shop in a village-like neighborhood, attend church in a pipe organ loft, and celebrate Bastille Day.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Travel to the centers of wealth, power, industry, and innovation. From London to Tokyo, Hong Kong to New York, these are the cities that never sleep. The influence held in these economic hubs unites the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Rivers flow freely - beautiful and powerful waterways that underscore the melody of life. As they meander through the landscape, they shape it, wearing down ranges and deepening valleys, eventually flowing out into the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Explore the world's greatest icons of water. From the mighty Nile river, over Victoria Falls, into Mexico's crystal cave, and onwards to the water-worlds of Kakadu, the Amazon, and Dead Sea, this is water in all its glory.

programme.title: Practical Magic
programme.desc: For two sisters from a family of witches, falling in love is the trickiest spell. They struggle to use their gift for magically guiding fate to overcome their family curse: The men they fall in love with are doomed to an untimely death!

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: When a family is held hostage, former hostage negotiator Jeff Talley arrives at the scene. Talley's own family is kidnapped and Talley must decide which is more important: saving a family he doesn't even know or saving his own family.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence. Every second becomes a fight to stay alive - to escape The Matrix.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: In the second chapter of the Matrix trilogy, Zion falls under siege to the Machine Army. Neo and Trinity choose to return to the Matrix with Morpheus. Now, Neo must follow the path he has chosen if he is to save humanity.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Louisville rookie homicide detective Collin King is assigned his first case when an unidentified man is found dead near a railroad track.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: The Miami homicide team is investigating the murder of a man found naked, tied up, and floating in Biscayne Bay.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a year with the gang unit, Detective Kevin Ruggiero returns to Miami Homicide, investigating a drive-by shooting that left two men dead.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: A 1992 attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. In time, the science of DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: September 1973, with three murders in just 3 months, South Wales Police realized they were looking for Wales’ first serial killer. A twenty-eight year investigation finally uncovered the perpetrator.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved
programme.desc: Police are unaware a murder has been committed until someone uses the information to try and leverage their freedom.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved
programme.desc: An elderly woman is murdered with extreme overkill and police question whet6her it is the work of a serial killer. Years later they find a clue in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: Although Josh Bailey suffers from mental disabilities, he's managed to carve out a decent life for himself. But after he disappears, his parents fear he's fallen in with the wrong crowd. Chris Hansen travels to Chapel Hill, NC to uncover the true story.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: College senior Susannah Chase had everything to live for... but just a few days before Christmas, she was brutally attacked only yards from her home. Chris Hansen travels to Boulder, CO to discover the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Dallas, two men on their way to visit family meet a hail of bullets. The case takes a surprising turn when Det. Tim Stewart discovers what they may have been shot over. Then in Cleveland, a preacher is found strangled in his home.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Harris County, a young father is carjacked and murdered outside his home. To find the killers, the homicide team needs to find the victim's car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Cleveland, when a teenager is shot down in the street, detectives discover his best friends may have something to do with the murder.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Dallas Detective Dwayne Thompson hunts for a band of carjacking killers that are terrorizing a neighborhood.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Dallas, a man is shot dead by a car thief and Detectives race to find the stolen vehicle before the killer gets away. And, in Cleveland, Detectives hunt for a witness to ID the shooter of young man robbed and killed outside a party.

programme.title: Posse
programme.desc: There's action galore in this off-beat western that features a group of mostly black infantrymen who return from the Spanish-American War with a cache of gold. The men travel to the West where their leader searches for the men who lynched his father.

programme.title: First Cow
programme.desc: Two travelers, on the run from a band of vengeful hunters in the 1820s Northwest, dream of striking it rich—but their tenuous plan to make their fortune on the frontier comes to rely on the secret use of a landowner's prized dairy cow.

programme.title: Blackthorn
programme.desc: Sam Shepard is Butch Cassidy in this thrilling western about the legendary outlaw's return from exile. After years of quiet, he embarks on his greatest adventure since his glory days with the Sundance Kid.

programme.title: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: Damsel
programme.desc: A businessman travels West to join his fiancée in the mountains.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: Dances With Wolves
programme.desc: After encountering and eventually being accepted by a Native American tribe, Dunbar's loyalties are put to the test when the army threatens his new home, forcing him to choose between white America or the natives he now calls his people.

programme.title: Poker Masters
programme.desc: Pot-Limit Omaha returns, as does Lou Garza with the chip lead; Garza looks for retribution ahead of Sean Winter, Miles Rampel, Jeremy Ausmus, and Ben Lamb.

programme.desc: Thirty-two of the world's best professional poker players buy-in for $50,000, but there's a twist. They'll be paired off and compete as two-person teams for the Doubles Poker Championship $1 million first place prize.
